response.justification: Bogdan has deep technical expertise, strong open-source contributions, and broad experience across architectures and languages, but lacks proven leadership in IT consulting, formal project management, and UML design — and his German is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with GISCollective and DLang tools, demonstrating initiative and technical depth.
Proven full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud systems with modern tools like Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS CDK.
Strong track record of mentoring and creating workshops, indicating communication and knowledge-sharing ability.
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting the mandatory C1 requirement.
No explicit evidence of IT architecture design, UML modeling, or client-facing technical advisory experience.
Current career gap and recent short-term roles raise questions about stability and leadership continuity.
